description: Netlify is a web platform for building, deploying, and operating websites and web applications. It provides hosting, deploy workflows, edge features, forms, functions, storage, database, and AI-related tooling.
summary: Netlify exposes a REST API at `api.netlify.com`, an OAuth-protected MCP server at `netlify-mcp.netlify.app/mcp`, and the `netlify` CLI; the API and CLI use bearer tokens, while the MCP server uses self-onboarding OAuth.
